title: Information or examples on running podman on startup on macOS
body:
### Feature request description

It would be good to have a sample launchctl file that actually works. I'm seeing a lot of commentary on the internet from people who can't seem to figure it out.


### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

I tried to write my own, it seemed reasonable but it resulted in podman restarting itself in a loop, which apparently makes the CLI very very confused, as it expects podman to either be there or not be there. 

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
